detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract VIDToken (VIDToken.sol#169-666) has payable functions:
	 - VIDToken.fallback() (VIDToken.sol#229-233)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [VIDToken](VIDToken.sol#L169-L666) has payable functions:
	 - [VIDToken.fallback()](VIDToken.sol#L229-L233)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
